positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a celestial journey: a lone astronaut in a retro-futuristic bubble helmet floating past ringed Saturn and nebulous galaxies. The composition uses clean, bold silhouettes against a deep gradient of ultramarine, sapphire, and burnt orange. The style is inspired by mid-century modern space art and Japanese woodblock prints (Ukiyo-e), utilizing strong linework, flat areas of color, and pointillism textures. Central focus, high contrast, vector graphic quality, perfect for screen printing, isolated on a clean background.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, gradient skin, writing, signature, logos, trademarks, copyrighted character, photograph, realism
